reasons: Floryn can heal Suyou globally, matching his mobile jungle pattern.
Suyou can commit deeper when Floryn's Bloom is ready as backup sustain.

proof.summary: Floryn supports Suyou's mobile dive with global healing.
worksBestWhen: Floryn uses Bloom before Suyou is already too low.
Suyou keeps mobility available after receiving the heal.
failureCases: Suyou is burst before healing matters.
Suyou dives into suppression or layered crowd control.

reasons: Chip can convert Suyou's first pressure into a team collapse.
Suyou can enter first, then Chip brings the rest of the team to finish the fight.

proof.summary: Suyou starts the fight, while Chip turns it into a coordinated portal collapse.
worksBestWhen: Suyou identifies a real target before Chip opens Shortcut.
Teammates are ready to use the portal together.
failureCases: Chip portals into a losing fight.
Suyou enters too early and dies.
Enemies disengage from the portal area.

reasons: Zetian reveals and controls enemies globally, giving Suyou clearer target selection.
Her movement support helps Suyou convert the global window into a dive.

proof.summary: Zetian creates a global reveal/control window, while Suyou uses mobility to reach the chosen target.
worksBestWhen: Suyou is already near the revealed target.
Zetian uses ultimate when Suyou has cooldowns ready.
failureCases: Suyou is too far to follow.
Suyou chooses the wrong target after reveal.

reasons: Angela can attach to Suyou and help him survive the commit window.
Suyou benefits because his fight pattern often moves away from normal support range.

proof.summary: Angela gives Suyou attached protection while he dives or brawls.
worksBestWhen: Angela attaches before Suyou uses all mobility.
Suyou commits while Angela can still protect him.
failureCases: Suyou dives into layered crowd control.
Anti-heal and burst reduce the sustain value.

reasons: Luo Yi can move Suyou and teammates into a surprise fight angle.
Suyou can use the teleport arrival to choose an aggressive form-based engage.

proof.summary: Luo Yi creates map-entry options, while Suyou converts the arrival into dive pressure.
worksBestWhen: Luo Yi's Diversion is coordinated with Suyou's cooldowns.
Suyou enters after teammates arrive instead of alone.
failureCases: The team splits targets after arrival.
